ddls:
CREATE TABLE "training_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training run */,
  "loss" REAL /* Training loss of the model */,
  "val_loss" REAL /* Validation loss of the model */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used in the training */,
  "dataset" TEXT /* Name of the dataset used for training */,
  "epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs for training */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used in the training */,
  "noise" REAL /* Amount of noise added to the training process */,
  "num_components" INTEGER /* Number of components in the model */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* Random seed for reproducibility */,
  "sparsity" REAL /* Level of sparsity applied to the model */,
  "model_architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the model (e.g., CNN, RNN) */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Machine learning algorithm used (e.g., SGD, Adam) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training run was initiated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID who initiated the training run */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset used */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Additional hyperparameters in JSON format */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training run (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated training run */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., accuracy, F1 score) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was logged */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch at which the metric was recorded */,
  "phase" TEXT /* Phase during which the metric was recorded (training/validation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("run_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each training run
Training loss of the model
Validation loss of the model
Batch size used in the training
